resolvedQuestions.summary: The chartered family has three live duplication samples and a larger empty-memory remainder: overlap is high in 002 and 003/001, medium in the 003 root, and zero in folders that still only have memory/.gitkeep.
The smallest safe memory is a compact retrieval wrapper with title, trigger phrases, anchor-rich semantic evidence, continuation state, and memory metadata rather than a repeated packet narrative.
Redundancy comes mainly from collect-session-data plus workflow template binding plus the packet-shaped template contract, not from the CLI wrapper alone.
Recall-safe minimum is a specific title, meaningful trigger phrases, semantic evidence, and anchors / metadata rather than full repeated ADR or implementation-summary prose.
The fix is to shrink memory saves into canonical-doc pointers plus compact evidence and metadata, with collector/workflow/template changes and no required static-template expansion.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: Iteration 1 closed Q1 too early because it sampled the wrong subtree.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: The chartered packet family has only a few actual memory-file samples; many target directories are empty-memory cases.

keyFindings.question: Q3
keyFindings.summary: The earlier 018 fix phase explicitly excluded template and MCP-server changes, leaving the current redundancy layer unresolved.

keyFindings.question: Q3
keyFindings.summary: collect-session-data synthesizes packet-summary material before render.

keyFindings.question: Q3
keyFindings.summary: workflow.ts binds implementation-summary arrays, decisions, and recovery metadata into one rendered memory.

keyFindings.question: Q4
keyFindings.summary: Trigger matching and hybrid search do not require full repeated packet prose.

keyFindings.question: Q2
keyFindings.summary: Unique memory value lives in decay, dedup, provenance, tool-call, exchange, and learning-delta metadata.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: Packet 002 duplicates overview, decisions, and file inventory across both static docs.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: The 003 root memory is a medium-overlap review-status replay against implementation-summary.md.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: Packet 003/001 duplicates implementation guide, overview, follow-up, and decisions mainly against implementation-summary.md.

keyFindings.question: Q1
keyFindings.summary: 003/002-007 and 005-013 currently have no generated memory .md, so present overlap there is zero.

keyFindings.question: Q5
keyFindings.summary: Level 3 decision-record and implementation-summary templates already cover the duplicated sections, so the fix belongs in the memory generator/template contract.

keyFindings.question: Q2
keyFindings.summary: Save-time sufficiency needs specific title, evidence counts, semantic substance, anchors, and meaningful triggers, not full repeated prose.

keyFindings.question: Q2
keyFindings.summary: Trigger matching is driven mainly by trigger phrases and tiered content, so long body sections have low auto-surface value.

keyFindings.question: Q2
keyFindings.summary: Search and parsing still want compact semantic body text, but not a second packet narrative.

keyFindings.question: Q2
keyFindings.summary: Continuation state, decay/dedup/causal metadata, tool-call summaries, exchanges, and postflight are the true memory-only payload.

keyFindings.question: Q5
keyFindings.summary: collect-session-data and buildImplementationGuideData currently assemble the redundant packet-summary material that should stop rendering by default.

keyFindings.question: Q5
keyFindings.summary: workflow.ts plus the template contract should switch the default memory shape from packet narrative to canonical-doc pointers plus compact evidence.

keyFindings.question: Q5
keyFindings.summary: decision-record.md should stay canonical for ADR prose, implementation-summary.md for build story and verification, and research/review docs can be optional third pointers.

ruledOutDirections.reason: The wrapper is thin; duplication is injected deeper in collection, workflow binding, and the template contract.

ruledOutDirections.idea: Broaden static spec-doc templates to absorb missing memory content
ruledOutDirections.reason: The Level 3 static templates already own context, decisions, implementation story, verification, and limitations.

ruledOutDirections.idea: Preserve full packet-shaped DECISIONS and CONVERSATION blocks in every default memory save
ruledOutDirections.reason: Trigger matching, sufficiency, and hybrid search do not require those long-form sections for baseline recall.
